Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ROBERT OTTINGER, OTTINGER FIRM P.C. DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT

Defendants Robert Ottinger and Ottinger Firm P.C.'s demurrer to the first amended complaint ("FAC") is overruled in its entirety. An Answer must be filed and served not later than August 28, 2023. (See word minutes for complete details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/CEK)
